batch_summary: In the apartment, Rachel receives a phone call from her father. To distract him, she blurts out a wild confession about having sex on his bed in college, only to frantically backtrack and blame Monica's "drunkenness" when Monica interrupts. Meanwhile, the rest of the group—Monica, Chandler, Ross, and Phoebe—play a board game and debate made-up words. The lighthearted chaos peaks when Ross's pet monkey steals the TV remote, leaving a Spanish cartoon playing on the screen.
